themes: The backlog is dominated by Managers who have been waiting weeks to months, signaling an urgent need to prioritize outreach cadence and set clear response SLAs for this user level.

Several accounts — including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, Ford, and others — appear multiple times with different contacts, suggesting these high-value accounts have broad, cross-team interest in product conversations that may benefit from a single coordinated session.

A small but strategically important cohort of Administrators (CONAM, LivCor, Oak Hill, The Goodman Group, Elegance Senior Living, Highmark Residential) has been waiting over 200 days, representing elevated churn and governance risk that warrants immediate escalation.
